hero.headline: Find the right person. On your own terms.
hero.subtext: Thoughtfully matched, verified for your safety. Take your time — meaningful connections are worth the wait.

featured.newDesc: Freshly joined members, ready to begin their search. Be among the first to say hello.
featured.premiumDesc: Verified, serious members who've upgraded for a more committed search.
featured.verifiedDesc: Connect with trusted doctors, engineers, and specialized experts verified for authenticity.

professionals.title: Verified Professionals
professionals.subtitle: Connect with trusted doctors, engineers & more

howItWorks.title: How MatchMedia works
howItWorks.subtitle: Privacy-first from the first tap to the first call.
howItWorks.step1Body: Every photo stays blurred by default — explore profiles without anyone's privacy exposed.
howItWorks.step2Body: Reveals happen only by mutual agreement; both sides must accept before anything opens up.
howItWorks.step3Body: Talk over in-app chat and voice calls. Your phone number and email are never shared.

map.title: Connecting people across Bangladesh
map.subtitle: Verified members in every division — matched thoughtfully, introduced privately.

curated.title: Curated for you
curated.subtitle: A handful of profiles worth a closer look — every photo private by default.

Dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your profile

cta.title: Find your match
cta.body: Browse verified profiles from across Bangladesh

pro.freeHint: Upgrade for unlimited access and instant ‘Who viewed me’

Viewers.title: Who viewed your profile
Viewers.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No one has viewed your profile yet} one {{n} person viewed your profile} other {{n} people viewed your profile}}
Viewers.heading: Who viewed me
Viewers.empty: No one has viewed your profile yet
Viewers.lockNote: New viewers are revealed 24 hours after they view your profile.

Browse.title: Browse profiles
Browse.subtitle: Photos stay blurred until you send a Request
Browse.resultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No matches} one {{n} profile} other {{n} profiles}}

viewQuota.remaining: {n} of {limit} free profile views left today
viewQuota.limitReached: You've viewed all {limit} profiles allowed today.

photo.blurredNotice: Photo is blurred to protect privacy

quota.remaining: {n} of {limit} free photo requests left today
quota.limitReached: You've used all {limit} free photo requests for today.

privacyNote.title: Contact details stay private
privacyNote.body: For your safety, phone numbers and emails are never shared. Connect through in-app messaging and voice calls once you match.

ProfileEdit.title: Edit your profile

welcome.title: Welcome to MatchMedia! 🎉
welcome.body: Your account is ready. Add a few more details below so the right matches can find you — your photos stay private until you choose to share.

ProfileEdit.genderLocked: Gender can't be changed. Contact support to correct a mistake.

fields.nameHidden: Hide my name on my profile

errors.MISSING: Gender and date of birth are required
errors.AGE: You must be at least 18 years old

photos.title: Photos
photos.subtitle: Add a profile photo and gallery. Photos stay blurred until you approve a request, unless you make them public.
photos.limitNote: Photo limit reached — delete one to add another.
photos.privacyHint: Your primary photo is the thumbnail others see. Blurred photos are revealed only after you approve a photo request.
photos.needProfile: Save your basic details first, then you can add photos.
photos.moderationNote: New photos are reviewed by our team before they're visible to others.

errors.TYPE: Use a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
errors.EMPTY: Please choose an image to upload.
errors.DECODE: That image couldn't be read. Try another file.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You can only manage your own photos.
errors.NO_PROFILE: Save your basic details first, then add photos.

Report.title: Report this profile
Report.intro: Tell us what's wrong. Our team reviews every report.
Report.notePlaceholder: Add any details that help us review this.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.subtitle: Moderate content, handle reports, and manage trust.

Messages.title: Messages
Messages.emptyHint: When you and a match accept each other, you can chat here.
Messages.threadEmpty: Say hello to start the conversation.
Messages.notMatched: You can no longer message this person.
Messages.verifyToSend: Verify your mobile number to send messages.

Calls.micUnavailable: No microphone — others can't hear you

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Private by design — your details stay protected.
register.mobileHint: Bangladeshi number — you'll verify it with a code.
register.privacyNote: By signing up you agree to keep our community respectful and your information truthful.

errors.MISSING: Please fill in all required fields
errors.WEAK: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.EXISTS: An account with this email already exists
errors.AGE: You must be at least 18 years old
errors.MOBILE: Enter a valid Bangladeshi mobile number
errors.INVALID: Account created, but sign-in failed. Please log in.

Pro.title: Go Pro
Pro.subtitle: Unlock unlimited browsing, instant ‘Who viewed me’ reveals, and priority placement in search.
Pro.activeUntil: Your Pro membership is active until {date}

perks.unlimited: Unlimited profile views and photo requests
perks.priority: Priority ranking in search and browse

viewLimit.title: Daily limit reached
viewLimit.body: Free members can view up to {limit} profiles per day. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited browsing.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.failed: Payment was not completed. Please try again.

success.title: Welcome to Pro!
success.body: Your Pro membership is now active.

VerifyMobile.title: Verify your mobile
VerifyMobile.subtitle: We'll send a 6-digit code by SMS to confirm your number.

banner.message: Verify your mobile number to unlock messaging and contact reveal.

errors.INVALID_NUMBER: Enter a valid Bangladeshi mobile number.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Please wait a moment before requesting another code.
errors.NO_CODE: No active code. Request a new one.
errors.EXPIRED: That code expired. Request a new one.
errors.TOO_MANY: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
errors.INVALID: That code is incorrect. Try again.

types.PHOTO_REQUEST: Someone requested access to your photo
types.INTEREST_ACCEPTED: Your interest was accepted — it's a match!
types.REPORT_RESOLVED: A report you filed was reviewed

Footer.disclaimer: This platform is only a communication medium; verifying identity and information is the user's responsibility.
